---
name: Bug report
about: Report something that isn't working as expected
title: "[bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ""
---

## Describe the bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## To reproduce

Steps to reproduce the behaviour, including the exact command:

```sh
skl ...
```

## Expected behaviour

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behaviour

What actually happened. Include output (use `--json` if relevant) and any
error messages.

## Environment

- skillshelf version / commit:
- Bun version (`bun --version`):
- OS:

## Additional context

Anything else that might help. Please redact any personal or private data
(names, emails, internal hosts, home paths, API keys).
